text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly realize that Mihono<n>Bourbon is in the
gym, training away<n>in silence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure she's been at it for<n>almost two
hours now—with no rest.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's time for a break?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern. I was<n>lost deep in
thought.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I have a question that requires your<n>input. Do
you find me frightening?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There have been rumors among the<n>academy
students that I may be a<n>cyborg.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm initially surprised by the absurdity<n>of this
rumor, but intrigue makes me<n>want to find out
more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The rumor took on a life of its own<n>before I could
confirm or deny the<n>claims...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear?! Mihono Bourbon can<n>shoot
beams out of her eyes!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wait, seriously?! I heard she can also<n>fire
rockets from her mouth!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rumors spawned more rumors, and<n>soon
enough my image had ballooned<n>into something
else entirely.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
One time, I merely picked up and<n>handed
someone her towel, when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Please, have mercy! Not the beams!<n>Anything but
the beams!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: How others evaluate me is none of<n>my concern.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, I've determined that my<n>frightening
image is a cause for<n>concern, unintentional
though it may<n>be.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As such, I've been searching for a<n>solution to
this predicament.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you have any suggestions, I would<n>appreciate
your input.
choice_data_list: Train your facial muscles to be more expressive!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see your point. So I should first work<n>on being
more expressive.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I've received many<n>comments
about my lack of<n>expression.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your valuable insight. I<n>will
commence training my facial<n>muscles at once.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She proceeds to buckle down into<n>training her
facial muscles...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she has such a lovely smile! Is<n>she really a
cyborg?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's not scary at all! Yeah, she's<n>definitely
just a regular Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the misunderstanding has<n>been
cleared up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Inflection... That is, to raise and lower<n>the tone of
my voice. I see your point.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So the misunderstanding stemmed<n>from my
mechanical-sounding voice. It<n>is a plausible
theory.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Situation confirmed. Inputting tone<n>inflection. I
appreciate your valuable<n>insight.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Mihono Bourbon starts<n>to speak
with inflection—in her own<n>unique way.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: HeeeLLLoOo EvERyyyOoOooNe!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Is she yodeling or something?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't know... Maybe she's trying<n>out her new
update?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She ends up instilling even more fear<n>amongst
the students.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Commencing new search for<n>solutions.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She gets tunnel vision searching for a<n>new
solution and is unable to<n>concentrate on training.
